meaning: adj.(有关)卫生的,(保持)清洁的,清洁卫生的n.(有关生设备的)公共厕所
examples: The hut had no cooking or sanitary facilities.
The new houses were more sanitary than the old ones had been.
Tens of thousands of food rations and sanitary packages have been handed out, Merten said.
Sure, in new editions, Margaret's sanitary napkin and belt have been replaced with adhesive pads.
